title: Controller General page
description:
Controller General page

[Setup]-[System Configuration]-[Controller]-[General] Page

This page allows the user to view general information about the controller.

Item	Description

Serial
		 #	Displays
		 the serial number of the current controller.

MAC Address	Displays
		 the MAC Address of the controller.

Firmware
		 Version	Displays
		 the firmware version used in the current controller.

Date
		 / Time	Displays
		 the current date and time in the controller.

Project
		 Name	Displays
		 the name of the project in the controller.
